form.formComment: Last start was well beaten into eighth behind Chanceoflightning at this track over 1609m in a FMNW7500L5 on April 3 at $41.08. Performed better the start before with a good run when 2nd (Fr1) over 1609m at this track beaten 9 m by Ideal Cover (1:54.30) in FMNW5000L5 on March 27 at $3.34. The testing material off the pegs.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 1609m at this track beaten 10 m by Mc Angel (1:54.10) in FM20000CLM on March 31 at $4.47.
